Field of study: Eligible CIP codes for trade

Last updated: July 4, 2025

Check below to find out which Classification of Instructional Programs (CIP) code (opens in a new tab) in the trade category is eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP).

CIP code(s) found

    CIP code: 01.0205

    Your CIP code is eligible if you submitted your

    Study permit application: Option 1 of 2

    • After June 25, 2025

    • After June 25, 2025
